privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic "Exam Anxiety" dataset. Independent evaluation using OLS regression (Exam ~ Revise + Anxiety) directly on the raw CSV data confirms the true coefficients: Intercept=87.83, Revise_B=0.24, Anxiety_B=-0.48, Revise_95_CI_Lower=-0.12. The predicted Exam score for 10 hours of revision and 50 anxiety is 66.00. The verifier calculates these dynamically as well. The metadata paths correctly reflect the setup script and task instructions.
